rootCause: Node emitted ExperimentalWarning diagnostics for known third-party CommonJS-to-ESM interop inside npm's debug/supports-color dependency path and ESLint's eslintrc/svelte-eslint-parser compatibility path while validation scripts nested npm, npx, ESLint, and Playwright web server invocations.
resolution: Added a targeted Node preload filter for only those third-party ExperimentalWarning messages, removed avoidable nested npm setup calls from common frontend scripts, passed the filter through scripted npm/build/test child processes, and started the Playwright Astro preview through the local Astro CLI instead of npx so real lint, type, build, test, console, and Playwright failures still surface normally.
